posts.text: I can't lie… the food in America is ridiculous. Everyone talks about portion sizes, but nobody talks enough about how GOOD everything tastes. Even the 'quick' food feels elite compared to what I'm used to in the U.K.
posts.author: @SkylarSkye3

posts.text: I must now formally apologize to the biscuits, the gravy, the waitress, the kitchen and the entire breakfast tradition of the American South. It was magnificent
posts.author: @japan_nobunaga

posts.text: They have wells of salsa. The supply lines of this nation are beyond anything... By the time my actual food arrived, I was a ruined man. I was not hungry. I was not comfortable.
posts.author: @japan_nobunaga

posts.text: I wrote about free chips and salsa. The samurai wandered too far.

posts.text: My name is Hirochika Nakakuki. It's live? Yes, it's live! Excuse me, I cannot speak English, but I'm excited! I love it! Yeah baby!

posts.text: International fans visiting the U.S. for the 2026 FIFA World Cup are going viral for their reactions to everyday American life. […] Scottish fan Shaun Cumming […] 'It is extremely expensive here. It is a shock to the system for people arriving here for the first time.'
posts.author: @pubity
